# Random Mini Apps

Random Mini Apps publishes focused apps for Apple devices, including educational and productivity tools.

## Apps

- [BoomColor](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/coloring-book/): relaxing coloring book app with 700+ pages, tap-to-fill painting, creative effects, daily challenges and photo imports for iPhone and iPad.
- [Car HUD Display](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/car-hud-display/): iPhone heads-up display app with GPS speed, trip widgets, mirror mode and smart brightness.
- [ClinSpeak OET](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/clinspeak-oet/): OET-style speaking practice app for nurses with timed clinical role plays, transcript replay and structured feedback.
- [Keepie Yuppie](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/keepie-yuppie/): physics-based ball juggling game with 99 levels, weather effects, obstacles, survival mode and Game Center.
- [Lighting Check](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/lighting-check/): camera-based light intensity app for estimating lux and comparing readings with location standards.
- [MedViva Coach](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/medviva-coach/): AI mock interview practice app for A-level students and UK medicine applicants preparing for medical school interviews.
- [MsgSecret](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/msgsecret/): message encoding and decoding app for sharing ciphertext through email, SMS, chat and social apps.
- [NMC OSCE AI Coach](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/nmc-osce-coach/): OSCE-style voice practice for UK adult nursing students with timed stations, AI patient conversations, checklist feedback and exam plans.
- [Natural Text](https://randomminiapps.github.io/apps/natural-text/): secret-key text transformation app that encrypts messages into natural-looking text.

## Notes

MedViva Coach is an educational practice tool and is not affiliated with UCAS, any medical school, the NHS, or any official admissions body. It does not guarantee interview invitations, offers, or admission outcomes.

ClinSpeak OET is an independent preparation tool and is not endorsed by or affiliated with the official OET test. Its clinical scenarios are fictional practice examples and are not medical advice.

NMC OSCE AI Coach is an independent educational practice tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or approved by the Nursing and Midwifery Council. Scenarios and feedback are for exam communication practice only and are not clinical guidance.
